name: risk-adjusted-rank
thesis: Rank candidates by momentum per realized volatility.

name: downside-risk-rank
thesis: Rank candidates by momentum per downside volatility.

name: drawdown-penalty-rank
thesis: Penalize candidates with deeper lookback drawdowns.

name: momentum-slope-rank
thesis: Reward candidates whose recent momentum confirms lookback momentum.

name: positive-futures-bias-rank
thesis: Keep futures two-sided but slightly prefer positive trends.

name: inverse-downside-vol-weight
thesis: Weight sleeve slots by inverse downside volatility.

name: sqrt-inverse-vol-weight
thesis: Soften inverse-vol concentration with square-root weighting.

name: equal-risk-control
thesis: Test whether current inverse-vol weighting is overfitting tail cases.

name: futures-short-confirm
thesis: Route negative futures signals to cash unless recent momentum also confirms.

name: futures-short-half-weight
thesis: Cut confirmed futures short exposure in half and hold the remainder as cash.

name: etf-high-water-filter
thesis: Require ETF longs to be near their lookback high before taking risk.

name: recent-shock-cash
thesis: Move shocked candidates to cash when recent move dwarfs realized volatility.

name: close-score-cash
thesis: Hold cash when the selected names are too tightly clustered by score.

name: decay-penalty
thesis: Reduce weight when recent momentum conflicts with lookback momentum.

name: max-position-cap
thesis: Cap a single selected position and keep the excess in cash.

name: two-step-rebalance
thesis: Move only halfway to the new target each rebalance.

name: small-change-hold-band
thesis: Ignore small target-weight changes to reduce ranking noise.

name: larger-cash-buffer
thesis: Increase the standing cash buffer for extra tail protection.

name: smaller-cash-buffer
thesis: Release a little cash to see whether the best mechanism is too defensive.
